name: PRIMARY PULMONARY LYMPHOMA
definition: monoclonal lymphoid proliferation within lung parenchyma low-grade marginal zone B-cell lymphoma of mucosa-associated lymphoid tissue

demographics.Prevalence: 3-4% of extranodal lymphomas; 1% of lung malignancies
demographics.Histo: sheets of monoclonal lymphocytes + occasional interspersed plasma cells

discriminating_features: areas of ground-glass attenuation / consolidation in bronchovascular distribution
patchy large areas of ground-glass attenuation throughout lungs (rare)

general: areas of ground-glass attenuation / consolidation in bronchovascular distribution
patchy large areas of ground-glass attenuation throughout lungs (rare)
